title: SentinelMesh Kafka Message Envelope
description: Every Kafka message in the SentinelMesh pipeline conforms to this envelope. Per-topic payload shapes are defined in sibling schema files and validated separately. See docs/SCHEMA.md.

payload.description: Topic-specific payload. Shape is defined per topic in <topic>.payload.schema.json.

schema_version.description: Frozen at 1.0.0 for the initial freeze. See docs/SCHEMA.md §4 for bump rules.

org_id.description: Tenant identifier. Default 'org-000' for single-tenant deployments.

event_id.description: Per-message unique ID. UUIDv7 recommended (time-sortable); UUIDv4 accepted.

produced_at.description: RFC3339 UTC timestamp with millisecond precision (trailing 'Z' mandatory).

trace_id.description: End-to-end trace identifier. Set once at ingestion, copied forward unchanged through all pipeline stages. See docs/SCHEMA.md §3.

Uuid.description: UUID (any version). Lowercase canonical form: 8-4-4-4-12 hex.

Rfc3339UtcMs.description: RFC3339 timestamp in UTC with millisecond precision. Form: YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SS.sssZ
